nmaprun.args: /usr/lib/nmap/nmap --privileged -vv --reason -Pn -T4 -sV -p 47001 "--script=banner,(http* or ssl*) and not (brute or broadcast or dos or external or http-slowloris* or fuzzer)" -oN /home/kali/Vault/Target/10.129.58.117/result/autorecon/10.129.58.117/scans/tcp47001/tcp_47001_http_nmap.txt -oX /home/kali/Vault/Target/10.129.58.117/result/autorecon/10.129.58.117/scans/tcp47001/xml/tcp_47001_http_nmap.xml 10.129.58.117
